message:
style(core,tools,server): idiomatic Rust cleanup for pane identity and imports

pane_identity.rs:
- Replace match-on-read_dir with let-else (let Ok(entries) = ... else)
  in cleanup_stale_identities(), cleanup_all_stale_identities(), and
  list_identities() — reduces nesting and is the idiomatic Rust pattern
  for early returns on error.
- Collapse nested if-is_file/if-remove_file conditions into single
  combined conditions using && short-circuit evaluation.
- Add #[must_use] to write_identity_current_pane(),
  cleanup_stale_identities(), and cleanup_all_stale_identities() to
  warn callers who discard their return values (which carry important
  information about what was written/removed).
- Reformat read_identity_file() inline if-else to multi-line block for
  rustfmt compliance.
- Fix doc comment link syntax (bare mcp_agent_mail#111 -> backtick-quoted).
- Reorder pub use re-exports in core/lib.rs to be alphabetically sorted
  (pane_identity before search_types).

identity.rs (tools):
- Reformat tracing::debug!() calls from multi-line to single-line where
  the message fits within line width.

server/lib.rs:
- Reformat import block for mcp_agent_mail_tools to satisfy rustfmt
  line-width rules.

resources.rs:
- Remove trailing whitespace in test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
